title: Lamb and Mediterranean Flatbread
description: A flavorful flatbread topped with lamb and Mediterranean ingredients, perfect for a quick dinner. This recipe combines the richness of lamb with the freshness of Mediterranean herbs.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt, pepper, and garlic (if using).
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side. Transfer the lamb to a plate and set aside.
Brush the flatbreads with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil and place them on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the melted butter on top of the flatbreads.
Bake the flatbreads in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Top each flatbread with a portion of the lamb, some chopped parsley, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
